items.title: U.S. Treasury yields edge higher as Wall Street monitors Middle East tensions
items.description: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose over 1 basis point to 4.558%.

items.title: UK to get a new prime minister as Trump slams Britain as 'Poverty Stricken Disaster'
items.description: The prospect of Burnham, considered more left-leaning than Starmer, replacing the incumbent prime minister sent jitters through bond markets earlier this year.

items.title: Bezos backs CuspAI as startup teams up with Nvidia to hunt for chipmaking materials
items.description: CuspAI is part of a new wave of companies looking to use AI to solve challenges in the physical world.

items.title: Oil prices erase gains after Iran says U.S. talks could be pursued based on national interests
items.description: American forces have started ninth consecutive night of strikes against Iranian targets.

items.title: Boeing CEO says company still needs 'a couple more years' to repair finances before new jet
items.description: CEO Kelly Ortberg signalled Boeing is focused more on stabilizing its existing business than rushing to develop a successor to its best-selling 737 MAX.

items.title: Ryanair stock slides 6% as higher fuel costs amid Iran war dent profit
items.description: Ryanair's first-quarter profit took a 34% hit as consumers delayed bookings due to the Middle East crisis, while struggling airlines face a "difficult winter."

items.title: China's car market heads for worst year since 2021 as sales plunge 20%
items.description: Consumer demand for cars in China tumbles following record-high sales of 23.7 million units in 2025.

items.title: Samsung Biologics makes $1.8 billion all-cash offer for Switzerland's PolyPeptide Group
items.description: South Korea's Samsung Biologics said on Monday that it had made an all-cash bid of 1.46 billion Swiss francs ($1.8 billion) for Switzerland's PolyPeptide Group.

items.title: TSMC is accelerating Arizona factory buildout to capitalize on AI 'megatrend,' CFO says
items.description: Speaking in an interview with CNBC, TSMC's Wendell Huang said the fresh investment comes on the back of robust customer demand.

items.title: From 'Super El Niño' to Europe’s extreme heatwave: How this year's weather shocks are rattling commodity markets
items.description: Markets are underestimating the impact of climate volatility on a range of asset classes, commodity strategists say.

items.title: FIFA emerges as the $9 billion winner as the biggest, brashest World Cup ever draws to a close
items.description: The football governing body presided over the most lucrative sporting event in history and is poised to net over $9 billion in revenue for 2026.

items.title: Russia pounds Kyiv as NATO military chief warns Moscow would 'lose a lot' by attacking Baltics
items.description: Russia and Ukraine traded their heaviest strikes in months, fueling fears of escalation and further strain on oil supplies.

items.title: 'Give me my money back': South Korean traders' leveraged SK Hynix, Samsung bets unravel after selloff
items.description: South Korean retail investors suffer heavy losses after Samsung and SK Hynix shares reverse sharply.

items.title: China's Zhongji Innolight sees shares surge after Hong Kong listing approval
items.description: The deal size will exceed Luxshare Precision's $3.1 billion IPO earlier this month, making it the largest listing in Hong Kong this ​year.

items.title: Plenty of stocks are working in this market — you just have to look beyond tech
items.description: The big unanswered question is how long there can be such terrific opportunities outside tech before it dawns on those overweight the sector.

items.title: World Cup 2026 final in photos: Spain triumphs as football crowns a new champion
items.description: Spain reclaimed football's biggest prize on Sunday, defeating Argentina 1-0 after extra time in a tense World Cup final.

items.title: FBI will no longer investigate ICE confrontations, The New York Times reports
items.description: The Department of Justice and the Department of Homeland Security have both denied that any change in oversight has taken place.

items.title: Universal and Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' sails to $124.5 million opening
items.description: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" tallied an estimated $124.5 million at the domestic box office, with IMAX screenings fueling a big haul.

items.title: The market for psychedelic drugs to treat mental health conditions gets a big buy signal
items.description: Eli Lilly's acquisition of psychedelic drug maker AtaiBeckley extends Big Pharma's embrace of a stigmatized class of medications for treating mental health.

items.title: AI may make you 'boring' at work, Columbia Business School professor says: How it can hurt your career
items.description: Using AI at work in the wrong ways could lead to "gradually falling behind and becoming complacent," said Sandra Matz, a professor at Columbia Business School.
